scenarios.description: Calling setTrackPosition(true) on a new Parser sets trackPosition from false to true and returns the same instance
scenarios.expectedResult: returned instance is the same parser; parser.isTrackPosition() == true
pseudocode: TEST TC01 setTrackPosition enables position tracking

scenarios.description: Calling setTrackPosition(false) on a new Parser leaves trackPosition false and returns the same instance
scenarios.expectedResult: returned instance is the same parser; parser.isTrackPosition() == false
pseudocode: TEST TC02 setTrackPosition leaves tracking disabled

scenarios.description: Chaining setTrackPosition(true) then setTrackPosition(false) flips trackPosition from false→true→false on the same instance
scenarios.precondition: Parser parser = new Parser(new HtmlTreeBuilder()); // default trackPosition=false
scenarios.expectedResult: after first call parser.isTrackPosition()==true; after second call parser.isTrackPosition()==false; both returns reference same parser
pseudocode: TEST TC03 setTrackPosition chaining toggles tracking
